mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT B.BROKER_CODE brokerCode, B.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE subBrokerId, B.BROKER_BRANCH_KIND brokerBranchKind, B.BRANCH_NAME brokerBranchName FROM BRANCH_MEDIATE_INFO A INNER JOIN MEDIATE_BRANCH B ON A.BROKER_CODE = B.BROKER_CODE AND B.BROKER_BRANCH_KIND = '00' AND B.DELETE_FLG = '0' AND A.DELETE_FLG = '0' WHERE A.BRANCH_CODE = #{req.sbiSecurityCode} ORDER BY B.BROKER_CODE ASC, B.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE ASC

SELECT DISTINCT A.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE subBrokerId, A.BRANCH_NAME brokerBranchName FROM MEDIATE_BRANCH A WHERE A.DELETE_FLG = '0' AND A.BROKER_CODE = #{req.brokerCode} AND A.BROKER_BRANCH_KIND != '00' ORDER BY A.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_MED_USERS_PRIV ( USER_ID, SEQ_NO, BRANCH_ID, BROKER_ID, SUB_BROKER_ID, EMPLOYEE_ID, EMPLOYEE_NAME, DELETE_FLG, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{req.userId}, SEQ_TB_MED_USERS_PRIV.NEXTVAL, #{req.sbiSecurityCode}, #{req.brokerCode}, #{req.subBrokerId}, #{req.employeeId}, #{req.chargeName}, '0', #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE )
mapper.select: SELECT BRANCH_CODE, BRANCH_KIND, BRANCH_NAME, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATE_BY, DELETE_DATE, DELETE_FLG FROM BRANCH WHERE DELETE_FLG = '0' AND BRANCH_KIND = #{req.branchKind} ORDER BY BRANCH_CODE ASC
